metric.description: Type of metric being tracked for the ticket

id.description: Unique identifier for the ticket metric event

time.description: Timestamp when the metric event occurred

instance_id.description: Unique identifier for the specific instance of the metric event

ticket_id.description: Unique identifier for the ticket associated with the metric event

type.description: Type of metric event (e.g., update, change, escalation)

sla.description: Available if type is "apply_sla". The SLA policy and target being enforced on the ticket and metric in question

id.description: Unique identifier for the SLA policy

target.description: Target time in minutes for the SLA

business_hours.description: Whether the SLA target uses business hours

group_sla.description: Available if type is "apply_group_sla". The Group SLA policy and target being enforced on the ticket and metric in question

id.description: Unique identifier for the Group SLA policy

title.description: Title of the Group SLA policy

description.description: Description of the Group SLA policy

target.description: Target time in minutes for the Group SLA

business_hours.description: Whether the Group SLA target uses business hours

status.description: Available if type is "update_status". Minutes since the metric has been open

calendar.description: Minutes the metric has been open in calendar hours

business.description: Minutes the metric has been open in business hours

deleted.description: Available if type is "breach". In general, any branch event can be ignored when deleted is true
